title: Payment Gateway Outage
description: Payment gateway was unresponsive for 45 minutes due to database connection pool exhaustion
resolution: Increased connection pool size from 50 to 200, added connection timeout
rootCause: Database connection leak under high load

title: User Login Failures
description: Users unable to login due to Redis session cache corruption
resolution: Cleared Redis cache and restarted session service
rootCause: Memory corruption in Redis cluster after upgrade

title: Order Processing Delay
description: Orders stuck in 'processing' state due to Kafka consumer lag
resolution: Increased consumer partitions from 3 to 6, scaled consumer group
rootCause: Unbalanced partition assignment after new deployment

title: Fraud Scoring Timeout
description: Fraud detection ML model inference timing out after new model deployment
resolution: Rolled back model to v2, optimized feature computation
rootCause: Model v3 had 2x inference time due to additional features

title: API Gateway Rate Limiting Issue
description: Legitimate traffic being rate limited incorrectly
resolution: Fixed rate limiting configuration to use correct client identification headers
rootCause: Misconfigured rate limiting key extraction

title: Product Search Unavailable
description: Elasticsearch cluster health degraded to yellow, search queries failing
resolution: Reallocated shards and increased cluster nodes from 3 to 5
rootCause: Disk space exhaustion on Elasticsearch data nodes

title: Notification Delivery Failure
description: Email notifications not being delivered due to SMTP relay configuration change
resolution: Reverted SMTP configuration to previous working version
rootCause: Misconfigured SMTP credentials after rotation

title: Inventory Sync Failure
description: Inventory levels not syncing from warehouse systems
resolution: Restarted sync service and reprocessed failed messages
rootCause: Message format mismatch after API contract change

title: Payment Refund Errors
description: Payment refunds failing with 500 errors
resolution: Fixed transaction ID lookup query optimization
rootCause: Missing database index on transaction lookup field

title: Authentication Token Expiry
description: JWT tokens expiring prematurely after clock skew
resolution: Adjusted token validation to allow 30 second clock skew
rootCause: NTP sync issue on authentication servers

title: Database Proxy Connection Pool Exhaustion
description: All database connections exhausted causing cascading failures
resolution: Increased max connections, added connection leak detection
rootCause: Connection leak in order-service database queries

title: CDN Cache Purge Failure
description: Stale product images being served from CDN
resolution: Forced full cache purge
rootCause: Cache purge queue backlog

title: Analytics Report Generation Failure
description: Daily analytics reports not generating
resolution: Restarted scheduled job, reprocessed failed reports
rootCause: ClickHouse query timeout after schema change

title: Shipping Label Generation Error
description: Unable to generate shipping labels due to carrier API changes
resolution: Updated carrier API client to v2
rootCause: Carrier API v1 deprecation without notice

title: ML Feature Computation Delay
description: Feature computation taking 10x longer than expected
resolution: Optimized feature pipeline parallelization
rootCause: Sequential processing after code refactor

title: Audit Log Ingestion Failure
description: Audit logs not being written to TimescaleDB
resolution: Fixed schema migration issue in audit service
rootCause: Missing column in TimescaleDB hypertable

title: Config Service Unreachable
description: All services unable to refresh configuration from config server
resolution: Restarted config service cluster
rootCause: Corrupted config cache in config service

title: Checkout Cart Data Loss
description: Users reporting lost shopping cart contents
resolution: Restored cart from Redis backup, fixed eviction policy
rootCause: Aggressive Redis eviction policy under memory pressure

title: Product Catalog Search Slowdown
description: Product search queries taking >5 seconds
resolution: Added missing Elasticsearch index, optimized queries
rootCause: Missing index on frequently searched fields

title: Kafka Broker Failure
description: Kafka broker crash caused message loss for order events
resolution: Replaced failed broker, reprocessed from last checkpoint
rootCause: Disk failure on Kafka broker node

title: Shipping Rate Calculation Errors
description: Incorrect shipping rates being calculated for international orders
resolution: Fixed postal code validation and rate table lookup
rootCause: Outdated international shipping rate tables

title: User Profile Update Failures
description: Users unable to update profile information
resolution: Fixed optimistic locking conflict in user update query
rootCause: Missing retry logic for concurrent updates

title: Payment Gateway SSL Certificate Expiry
description: SSL certificate expired causing payment processing failures
resolution: Replaced expired SSL certificate
rootCause: Certificate renewal process failure

title: Inventory Stock Discrepancy
description: Inventory counts mismatch between system and warehouse
resolution: Ran full inventory reconciliation, fixed sync pipeline
rootCause: Race condition in stock update event processing

title: API Gateway Plugin Crash
description: Custom Kong plugin crash causing gateway outage
resolution: Disabled custom plugin, reverted to previous version
rootCause: Memory leak in custom rate limiting plugin

title: Order Confirmation Email Missing
description: Order confirmation emails not being sent
resolution: Fixed template rendering engine error
rootCause: Broken HTML template after design update

title: Fraud Detection False Positives Surge
description: Sudden increase in false positive fraud scores during sale event
resolution: Adjusted risk thresholds for sale period, retrained model on new data
rootCause: Model not trained on promotion-period transaction patterns

title: Database Failover Test Failure
description: Automated failover did not complete within SLA
resolution: Fixed failover script timing issues
rootCause: Stale connection pool not draining before failover

title: Search Relevance Degradation
description: Product search results relevance score degraded significantly
resolution: Rebuilt Elasticsearch index with updated scoring profile
rootCause: Corrupted search relevance profile after update

title: Config Feature Flag Corruption
description: Feature flags reverting to default values randomly
resolution: Restored config from backup, fixed Git backend sync
rootCause: Git merge conflict in config repository

title: New User Registration Spike DDoS
description: Coordinated fake user registration attack
resolution: Enabled rate limiting on registration endpoint, added CAPTCHA
rootCause: No rate limiting on registration endpoint

title: Payment Reconciliation Failure
description: End-of-day payment reconciliation reports showing discrepancies
resolution: Fixed timestamp comparison logic in reconciliation job
rootCause: Timezone conversion bug in reconciliation script

title: Redis Cluster Split-Brain
description: Redis cluster experienced split-brain, inconsistent cart data
resolution: Restored from backup, reconfigured Redis cluster with quorum settings
rootCause: Network partition in Redis cluster

title: Order Service Memory Leak
description: Order service pods running out of memory after 48 hours uptime
resolution: Fixed unclosed database result sets, increased heap size
rootCause: Database cursor not closed in paginated order queries

title: API Version Deprecation
description: Legacy API v1 clients failing after schema change
resolution: Extended deprecation period, notified affected clients
rootCause: Insufficient deprecation notice period

title: Notification Queue Backlog
description: RabbitMQ queue growing to 500k+ pending notifications
resolution: Scaled consumer workers from 5 to 20, optimized template rendering
rootCause: Under-provisioned consumer capacity during sale peak

title: Elasticsearch Cluster Rebalance
description: Elasticsearch cluster rebalancing causing intermittent search failures
resolution: Pinned indices to nodes, scheduled rebalance during maintenance
rootCause: Automatic shard reallocation during peak hours

title: Auth Service Token Refresh Issue
description: Refresh tokens expiring before access tokens
resolution: Fixed refresh token TTL configuration
rootCause: Misconfigured token lifetime settings

title: CDN SSL Configuration Error
description: CDN edge nodes returning SSL handshake errors
resolution: Updated SSL configuration on edge nodes
rootCause: Outdated SSL cipher suite configuration

title: Audit Trail Missing Entries
description: Compliance audit found gaps in audit trail during 2-hour window
resolution: Reprocessed Kafka audit events for missing window
rootCause: Audit consumer crash during deployment

title: ML Model Serving Latency Spike
description: ML model inference latency spiking to 2 seconds
resolution: Scaled inference pods, optimized model batch size
rootCause: Concurrent request spike without autoscaling trigger

title: Shipping Carrier API Outage
description: Major carrier API outage affecting label generation
resolution: Failed over to backup carrier, processed labels in batch
rootCause: Carrier API infrastructure failure

title: Database Query Performance Regression
description: CPU usage spike on database proxy due to unoptimized queries
resolution: Identified and optimized slow queries, added query timeouts
rootCause: Missing query timeout configuration

title: Prometheus Metrics Export Failure
description: Prometheus unable to scrape metrics from half of services
resolution: Restarted Prometheus exporters on affected services
rootCause: Metrics endpoint timeout due to high load

title: Checkout Timeout During Flash Sale
description: Checkout processing timing out during flash sale event
resolution: Pre-scaled services, optimized checkout workflow
rootCause: Insufficient capacity planning for flash sale

title: Grafana Dashboard Data Gap
description: Grafana dashboards showing data gaps for 1 hour
resolution: Fixed data source refresh interval
rootCause: Configuration change in data source settings

title: User Data Export Failure
description: GDPR data export requests failing to generate
resolution: Fixed data export job, reprocessed failed requests
rootCause: File permission issue on export directory

title: Payment Fraud Ring Detection Delay
description: 48-hour delay in detecting organized fraud ring
resolution: Deployed hotfix for real-time graph analysis, improved detection
rootCause: Graph analysis pipeline ran only on daily batch schedule

title: Order History Query Slow
description: Order history queries taking >30 seconds for power users
resolution: Added composite index on user_id + created_at
rootCause: Missing database index for common query pattern

title: Kafka Topic Partition Under-replication
description: Kafka topics showing under-replicated partitions
resolution: Reassigned partitions, replaced degraded broker
rootCause: Disk I/O bottleneck on one Kafka broker
